## Summary\nFixes Vercel/Next type-check failure by adding `accepted_story_ledger_v1` to `ArtifactType` in `lib/evaluation/artifactPersistence.ts`.\n\n## Root cause\n`processor.ts` persists `accepted_story_ledger_v1` via `upsertEvaluationArtifact`, but that artifact literal was missing from the persistence-layer `ArtifactType` union.\n\n## Verification\n- `npx jest --runInBand __tests__/lib/evaluation/processor.test.ts __tests__/evaluation/storyLedgerApprovalNormalizer.test.ts`\n- Vercel failure reproduced from deployment logs and mapped to this exact type mismatch.\n\n## Scope\nMinimal type-contract fix only; no behavior change.
